presets.label: Homing — 3DOF + EKF nav
presets.description: Homing engagement with the EKF navigation filter active (emits nav_nis consistency channel).

presets.label: Homing — 6DOF rigid body
presets.description: Full 6-DOF rigid-body homing engagement with autopilot fin control.

presets.label: Homing — boosting motor
presets.description: Homing engagement with a thrusting boost phase (variable mass / thrust channel).

presets.label: Ballistic — round Earth
presets.description: Unguided ballistic round over a WGS-84 round-Earth model (no guidance).

presets.label: Ballistic — flat-Earth projectile
presets.description: Unguided 3-DOF projectile over flat Earth with atmospheric drag.

presets.label: Track — fused radar + IR
presets.description: Multi-sensor target-track fusion (ground radar + space IR). Populates track_* and track_nis.

presets.label: Track — ground radar only
presets.description: Single-sensor ground-radar target track (baseline for fusion comparison).

presets.label: Track — space IR only
presets.description: Single-sensor space-based IR target track (baseline for fusion comparison).

presets.label: Discrimination — decoys / CSO
presets.description: Seeker decoy / closely-spaced-object discrimination. Populates selected_obj, discrim_correct, discrim_margin.

presets.label: Engagement — launch-on-track cueing
presets.description: Cued launch-on-track engagement: track-confident launch then terminal homing (launch_time > 0).

presets.label: Monte Carlo — ProNav
presets.description: Dispersed Monte-Carlo homing set using ProNav guidance.

presets.label: Monte Carlo — APN
presets.description: Dispersed Monte-Carlo homing set using augmented proportional navigation (APN).
